title: 20% Off - Volcano & Traditional Village Tour
description: This full-day sightseeing tour begins after breakfast, visiting Ubud Palace, Aloha Bali Swing with scenic views, and Tegallalang rice paddies. title: 20% Off -  2 Hour Traditional Balinese Chocolate Scrub Massage
description: Indulge in a luxurious 2-hour Balinese massage with a chocolate body scrub and wrap using 100% pure cocoa butter and essential oils. The treatment includes a relaxing flower bath and body moisturizer, offering a warm and soothing experience.

brand.name: 2 Hour Traditional Balinese Chocolate Scrub Massage

title: 20% Off -  Discover Secret places of Nusa Penida
description: Depart early for a speedboat ride to Nusa Penida, arriving at 09:00. Visit Angel Billabong Beach and Broken Beach, featuring a natural pool. Explore Thyrex Dinosaurus Beach (Kelingking viewpoint) for its T-rex-shaped cliff. After lunch at Kelingking Beach, head to Crystal Bay for its clear waters and snorkeling opportunities. Return to Bali by speedboat at 05:00 PM.

brand.name: Discover Secret places of Nusa Penida

title: 20% Off - Bali Water Sports Packages
description: Enjoy marine adventures at Bali’s beaches with a 15-minute Jet Ski session and one Banana Boat ride. Suitable for thrill-seekers, the package includes access to lockers, changing rooms, and showers. Hotel transfers are provided.

title: 20% Off - Rafting at Ayung River & ATV RIDE Combination
description: Start with a 2-hour ATV ride on a 9 km track in Gianyar Regency, exploring rice fields, jungles, and villages. After lunch, proceed to Ayung River for a 2-hour white water rafting session with a professional guide. Safety equipment, showers, and towels are provided. Return to your hotel afterward.

brand.name: Rafting at Ayung River & ATV RIDE Combination

title: 20% Off - BALI ATV RIDE
description: Experience a 2-hour ATV ride on a 9 km track in Gianyar Regency, 30 minutes from Ubud. Ride through rice fields, jungles, rivers, and traditional Balinese villages with a professional guide. Suitable for beginners and professionals, this adventure offers stunning countryside views and muddy trails.

title: 20% Off - White Water Rafting at Ayung River- White Water Rafting at Ayung River
description: After breakfast, head to Ayung River for a 2-hour white water rafting adventure surrounded by lush jungle and rice paddies. Suitable for all skill levels, the tour includes a professional guide and all safety equipment. Post-rafting, use complimentary showers and towels, enjoy lunch, and return to your hotel.

brand.name: White Water Rafting at Ayung River

title: 20% Off - Mount Batur Sunrise Trekking – Natural Hot Spring
description: Embark on an early morning trek to the summit of Mount Batur (1,717 meters) for a glorious sunrise. The 1-2 hour ascent is guided, with torches and hiking gear provided. Explore the volcano’s rim, craters, steam fissures (where eggs are cooked for breakfast), and recent lava flows. Relax afterward in natural hot spring pools. Includes breakfast.

brand.name: Mount Batur Sunrise Trekking – Natural Hot Spring

title: 20% Off - Royal Family Temple & Tanah Lot Sunset Tour
description: This half-day tour starts at 02:30 PM, visiting Taman Ayun Temple, a Balinese Hindu temple surrounded by a fish pond in Mengwi. Continue to Alas Kedaton Monkey Forest, then conclude at Tanah Lot Temple, a scenic Hindu temple on a rock in the sea, famous for its sunset views and holy water site.

brand.name: Royal Family Temple & Tanah Lot Sunset Tour

title: 20% Off - Uluwatu Sunset & Kecak Dance Tour with BBQ Seafood
description: Depart at 02:30 PM to visit Garuda Wisnu Kencana Cultural Park, featuring a massive copper and brass statue of Vishnu and Garuda. Proceed to Uluwatu Temple for a stunning sunset view from a high cliff, followed by a Kecak dance performance with hundreds of performers narrating the Rama and Sita story. Conclude with a BBQ seafood dinner at Jimbaran before returning to your hotel.

brand.name: Uluwatu Sunset & Kecak Dance Tour with BBQ Seafood

title: 20% Off - Secret Nusa Penida Island & Snorkeling COMBO Tour
description: This full-day tour starts with an early pickup and transfer to Sanur harbor for an 08:00 AM speedboat to Nusa Penida. Upon arrival at 09:00, enjoy a snorkeling safari at SD & Ped Point, Gamat Bay, and Manta Point, exploring vibrant marine life and coral reefs. Visit Kelingking Beach viewpoint with its dramatic T-rex-shaped cliff, followed by lunch. Continue to Angel Billabong Beach’s natural infinity pool and Broken Beach. Return to Bali by speedboat at 05:00 PM.

brand.name: Secret Nusa Penida Island & Snorkeling COMBO Tour

title: 20% Off - Lake Temple & UNESCO Heritage Tour
description: Depart after breakfast to visit Ulun Danu Lake Temple, followed by a 1-hour trek at Jatiluwih, a UNESCO heritage site. After lunch, explore Taman Ayun Temple, the royal family temple of Mengwi Kingdom, and conclude with a sunset visit to Tanah Lot Temple before returning to your hotel.

brand.name: Lake Temple & Jatiluwih UNESCO Heritage Site Tour

title: 20% Off - Gate of Heaven Sunrise & Temple Trail Tour
description: Start early at 03:00 AM for a 3-hour drive to Lempuyang Temple to witness a sunrise at the iconic Gate of Heaven, offering stunning views of Mount Batur amidst fog. Visit Tirta Gangga water palace, a Hindus Holy River, and Taman Ujung Palace with its Balinese, European, and Chinese architectural blend. After lunch, explore Besakih Temple, Bali’s mother temple on Mount Agung’s slope, before returning to your hotel.

brand.name: Gate Of Heaven & Mother Temple Tour
